data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): Approved for LLM-behavioral fix with caveat — edit plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/worktree-dispatch.md to add rebase-on-entry + SESSION_HEAD_AT_DISPATCH verification. Caveat: confirm harness rebase behavior on next multi-agent batch before concluding root cause. Root-cause mechanism still requires harness-level validation.
